text:
Once upon a time in a lush, enchanted forest, there was a tiny kitten named Whisker who dreamed of adventure. Whisker lived with her mother, Feline, under a cozy old tree. The forest was home to many magical creatures, but Whisker felt most at home among the gentle, purring cats.

One sunny morning, as the first light of dawn painted the sky in soft hues, Whisker couldn't shake off the feeling that something special was about to happen. Her mother noticed the excitement in her eyes and decided to share the secret of the Moonlit Meadow with her daughter.

The Moonlit Meadow was said to bloom only once every full moon, filled with glowing flowers and sparkling streams that sang lullabies. Whisker had heard stories of it but never seen it for herself. With Feline's guidance, she packed a small bag with treats and set out under the stars.
